title: Godrej Interio is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Interio is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
